name: Yoga Sculpt (60-min, strength + cardio + yoga)
description: 60-minute drill-format class blending yoga with light free weights and cardio bursts. Heavy focus on repetitive movements (up/down/up/down) on a 4- or 8-count beat. Higher BPM throughout. Generic format used at many heated-yoga studios under names like Yoga Sculpt, Strength Yoga, Sculpt Flow.

music_pedagogy.beat: Drill format requires the cleanest beat alignment of any yoga class. Tracks must support rep-counted movements (squat up/down on 1 and 3, or pulse on every beat). Avoid breakdowns or unexpected drops mid-track.
music_pedagogy.voice: Cueing is dense and rapid (form corrections during reps). Pick tracks with sparse vocals or fully instrumental sections during drill blocks.
music_pedagogy.count: 4-count and 8-count are dominant. 'Down on 4, up on 4' is typical.

phases.name: Strength (Weights)
phases.notes: Free-weight drills. Tracks must hold steady rep cadence.

moment_tracks.rationale: A 'drop' moment at the strength-block transition — high-energy lyrical track to mark the shift.

content_filter: Filter explicit lyrics by default. Sculpt's gym-music sensibility may push the line — keep tracks tasteful for a yoga-studio audience.
